title: [IOS] Location sharing dialogue - Allow While Using App is selected
scenario: Location permission prompt reappears for Find My Device after user selected 'Allow While Using App' during initial onboarding
steps: 1. Install Poly Studio Mobile app and launch it for the first time.
3. When the location sharing dialogue appears, select 'Allow While Using App'.
4. Navigate to Poly Studio Mobile → App Settings → Find My Device (FMD).
5. Observe whether the location dialogue appears again.
6. Close and restart the Poly Studio Mobile app.
7. Navigate again to Poly Studio Mobile → App Settings → Find My Device (FMD).
8. Observe whether the location dialogue appears again.
expected: After selecting 'Allow While Using App' during onboarding, the user should be able to access Find My Device (FMD) from App Settings without seeing the location dialogue again. After restarting the app and opening FMD, the user should not be prompted again for location consent.
